Index

All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

A

ascentbusiness.annotation - package ascentbusiness.annotation
 
ascentbusiness.aspect - package ascentbusiness.aspect
 
ascentbusiness.exception - package ascentbusiness.exception
 

C

checkDuplicate(JoinPoint) - Method in class ascentbusiness.aspect.DuplicateCheckAspect
 
CheckDuplicate - Annotation Interface in ascentbusiness.annotation
Custom annotation to check for duplicate entries before saving/updating entities.
CheckDuplicateEntity - Annotation Interface in ascentbusiness.annotation
Entity-level annotation to automatically check for duplicates based on field configurations.
checkEntityDuplicates(JoinPoint) - Method in class ascentbusiness.aspect.EntityDuplicateCheckAspect
Intercept all save methods in repositories and check for entity-level duplicate annotations
combinedWith() - Element in annotation interface ascentbusiness.annotation.UniqueField
Additional fields that must also match for a duplicate to be considered Example: combinedWith = {"email"} means check firstName AND email together

D

DuplicateCheckAspect - Class in ascentbusiness.aspect
Aspect to handle duplicate checking for entities (METHOD-LEVEL) DEPRECATED: Use EntityDuplicateCheckAspect instead (ENTITY-LEVEL)
DuplicateCheckAspect(EntityManager) - Constructor for class ascentbusiness.aspect.DuplicateCheckAspect
 
DuplicateEntryException - Exception in ascentbusiness.exception
Exception thrown when a duplicate entry is detected
DuplicateEntryException(String) - Constructor for exception ascentbusiness.exception.DuplicateEntryException
 
DuplicateEntryException(String, Object) - Constructor for exception ascentbusiness.exception.DuplicateEntryException
 
DuplicateEntryException(String, Object, String) - Constructor for exception ascentbusiness.exception.DuplicateEntryException
 

E

enabled() - Element in annotation interface ascentbusiness.annotation.CheckDuplicateEntity
Whether to enable duplicate checking for this entity
entity() - Element in annotation interface ascentbusiness.annotation.CheckDuplicate
The entity class to check for duplicates
EntityDuplicateCheckAspect - Class in ascentbusiness.aspect
Aspect to check for duplicates at entity level using @CheckDuplicateEntity and @UniqueField annotations
EntityDuplicateCheckAspect(EntityManager) - Constructor for class ascentbusiness.aspect.EntityDuplicateCheckAspect
 
excludeSelfOnUpdate() - Element in annotation interface ascentbusiness.annotation.CheckDuplicate
Whether to ignore the check if updating (when ID is present) Default: true (will exclude current entity from duplicate check)
excludeSelfOnUpdate() - Element in annotation interface ascentbusiness.annotation.UniqueField
Whether to ignore the check if updating (when ID is present) Default: true (will exclude current entity from duplicate check)

F

fieldName() - Element in annotation interface ascentbusiness.annotation.UniqueField
Name of the field to check for uniqueness (required when used inside @CheckDuplicateEntity)
fields() - Element in annotation interface ascentbusiness.annotation.CheckDuplicate
The fields to check for duplicates (e.g., "email", "sku") Multiple fields can be specified for composite uniqueness
fieldValue() - Element in annotation interface ascentbusiness.annotation.UniqueField
The value that the field should equal for duplicate checking Example: fieldValue = "true"

G

getField() - Method in exception ascentbusiness.exception.DuplicateEntryException
 
getValue() - Method in exception ascentbusiness.exception.DuplicateEntryException
 
GlobalExceptionHandler - Class in ascentbusiness.exception
Global exception handler for REST controllers
GlobalExceptionHandler() - Constructor for class ascentbusiness.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler
 
groups() - Element in annotation interface ascentbusiness.annotation.UniqueField
Validation groups

H

handleDuplicateEntry(DuplicateEntryException) - Method in class ascentbusiness.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler
 
handleGenericException(Exception) - Method in class ascentbusiness.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler
 

I

initialize(UniqueField) - Method in class ascentbusiness.annotation.UniqueFieldValidator
 
isValid(Object, ConstraintValidatorContext) - Method in class ascentbusiness.annotation.UniqueFieldValidator
 

M

message() - Element in annotation interface ascentbusiness.annotation.CheckDuplicate
Custom error message to display when duplicate is found Default: "Duplicate entry found for {fields}"
message() - Element in annotation interface ascentbusiness.annotation.UniqueField
Error message when duplicate is found

O

onlyIfFieldEquals() - Element in annotation interface ascentbusiness.annotation.UniqueField
Only check for duplicates if this field equals the specified value Example: onlyIfFieldEquals = "isEnabled"

P

paramIndex() - Element in annotation interface ascentbusiness.annotation.CheckDuplicate
The index of the method parameter that contains the DTO/Entity to validate Default: 0 (first parameter)
payload() - Element in annotation interface ascentbusiness.annotation.UniqueField
Payload for clients

U

UniqueField - Annotation Interface in ascentbusiness.annotation
Field-level annotation to mark a field as unique and validate for duplicates.
UniqueFieldValidator - Class in ascentbusiness.annotation
Validator for @UniqueField annotation
UniqueFieldValidator() - Constructor for class ascentbusiness.annotation.UniqueFieldValidator
 

V

value() - Element in annotation interface ascentbusiness.annotation.CheckDuplicateEntity
Array of unique field configurations
